meleeap1.0.description:
## README ##
https://github.com/PinkSwitch/SSBMArchipelago#-setting-up-your-game-

# Super Smash Bros. Melee Archipelago Version 1.0 #
* Initial Release
## Known Issues ##
* The Percent display on the Lottery menu can be wonky and incorrect. The ACTUAL likelihood of rolling a new trophy functions as expected.
* Getting all of the trophies in a lottery pool will say your trophy class increases, however the class increase ha been removed
meleeap1.0.title: Archipelago Melee v1.0

## README ##

# Super Smash Bros. Melee Archipelago Version 1.0.2 #
# Fixes #
- Fixed Triforce Gathering missing Link requirement
- Fixed the characters for events 42-45 being erroneously shifted
- Game/Watch unlock match logic now checks for every character besides game n watch
## Known Issues ##
* The Percent display on the Lottery menu can be wonky and incorrect. The ACTUAL likelihood of rolling a new trophy functions as expected.
* Getting all of the trophies in a lottery pool will say your trophy class increases, however the class increase ha been removed
meleeap1.0.2.title: Archipelago Melee v1.0.2

meleeap1.1.description:
## README ##
https://github.com/PinkSwitch/SSBMArchipelago#-setting-up-your-game-

# Super Smash Bros. Melee Archipelago Version 1.1 #
## New Settings ##
* ``Hard All-Star Clear`` has been **REPLACED** with ``Hard Mode Clears``, which covers all main 1-Player Modes and the Very Hard bonus (if bonuses are enabled)
* ``10-Man Sanity``: Adds a check for each character clearing 10-Man Melee
## Changes ##
* Classic Clear Game & Watch (the flat zone check) reassigned to Any Main 1P mode
* Added a new Command to the client; ``/rig (trophy)``- Using this allows you to pay 30 coins while in the lottery to gurantee your next pull will be a trophy that you specify, from any of your unlocked lottery pools.
# Fixes #
- Assigned the Topi and Polar Bear KO bonuses to Adventure mode
* Fixed numerous bonuses having their trigger being off by one (Poser, Angelic, avenger KO, coward, weight lifter, stale moves)
* Fixed Vanilla lottery pool not generating
* Kirby Hat 4 now triggers properly
* Fixed the Hobbyist bonus not triggering
* Fixed Falco's unlock match not triggering if you previously completed the Mewtwo unlock match
* Fixed Tap Jump still triggering on Kirby/Jigglypuff's multi jump and shield jumps
## Known Issues ##
* The Percent display on the Lottery menu can be wonky and incorrect. The ACTUAL likelihood of rolling a new trophy functions as expected.
* Getting all of the trophies in a lottery pool will say your trophy class increases, however the class increase ha been removed
meleeap1.1.title: Archipelago Melee v1.1

meleeap2.0.description:
# Super Smash Bros. Melee Archipelago Version 2.0 #
## New Settings ##
* ``Automatic L-Cancel``: Automatically L-cancels for you
* ``Goal Trigger: Event 50``: Adds a Goal Trigger for completing Event 50
* ``Randomize Battle Items``: Locks the items that appear during matches until you find them in the multiworld. You can use the command ``/check_items`` to display what you've received
* ``Adventure, Classic, & All-Star Clear Trophies``: Enables or disables the mode clear trophy checks for the specified mode
* ``Disable Random 1P Trophies``: Removes the locations for trophies that only randomly spawn in 1-P modes
## Changes ##
* Link, Mewtwo and Young Link are now considered good combo characters for the training mode checks
* All-Star Mode is now logically considered viable for getting 1-P Trophies
* The patch will no longer be loadable at all on disk versions other than US 1.02
* The Super Smash Bros. Melee Client now uses a custom icon (courtesy of Marbychu)
* The 5 Stage Unlock Trophies (Birdo, Falcon Flyer, Kraid, UFO, Sudowoodo) are no longer guaranteed to be in the multiworld Trophy pool. The locations for owning those trophies will only exist if they are present. This also means the minimum amount of trophies in the multiworld is 1 instead of 5.
* You no longer need to put quotes around trophies with spaces in the name (e.g. Raphael Raven) when using /rig
*  **URGENT!!!!** Goal settings have been completely overhauled. Instead of having multiple Goal settings, there is now a single "Goal Triggers" option. You will need to manually enter which Triggers you want to be active, and they will still stack like before.
* A message is now displayed in the client when all of your goal conditions are met.
* The goal setting "All Events" has been changed to "Other Events" and requires beating Events 1-49
* Added a specific error for when a patch is not loaded
* The entire APworld has been refactored and upgraded under the hood. Hopefully there shouldn't be any issues.
* You can no longer connect to a server that does not match your patch version
# Fixes #
* Fixed good combo characters not being logically expected for 10-hit combo in training mode
* Fixed All-Star match 4 not being prefaced with event match
* Fixed Meta-Knight and Baby Mario trophy check not being riggable
* Fixed Excitebike trophy being named Excite Bike
* Fixed events always being unlocked if you disabled the "Enable Cheats" toggle
* Rocket KO Bonus assigned to any 1P mode
* Fixed a bug where Trophies in the start inventory would always be generated into the pool
* Fixed All Events actually checking targets
* Fixed Adventure/Classic Mode all character trophy checks not working
## Known Issues ##
* The Percent display on the Lottery menu can be wonky and incorrect. The ACTUAL likelihood of rolling a new trophy functions as expected.
* Getting all of the trophies in a lottery pool will say your trophy class increases, however the class increase ha been removed
meleeap2.0.title: Archipelago Melee v2.0
